title: AMAH'N KA MAWHNA TENG LAKHIA ZO

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungsim leh aw in Topa phat ning
La in sa ning lamdang hong itna

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Amah'n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo
Amin Siang phat un, Amin Siang phat un
Amah'n ka mawhna teng lakhia zo

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nopna khawlna ngah ding Ama kiang
Ka mawhna tawh ka pai ciang
Ka nget hong za in hong khahkhia ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka hu tawpna tawh Amah phat ning
Sihna ka zawh man in ah
Amha phat ning a tawntung in ah
